description: Phase 29: Creator Economy Enhancements - Pay-per-view, course/product storefront in packages/payments, Quant Compute Credits (pay-per-AI-action), and E2E test for earn-withdraw-tax-doc flow
steps: 1. Create `packages/payments/src/services/pay-per-view.service.ts` - PayPerViewService: allows creators to gate content behind one-time payments. Methods: createPaywall(creatorId, contentId, price), purchaseAccess(userId, contentId), checkAccess(userId, contentId), getRevenue(creatorId). Uses 85/15 creator/platform split.

2. Create `packages/payments/src/services/storefront.service.ts` - StorefrontService: course/product storefront for creators. Types: Product (digital goods, courses), StorefrontConfig. Methods: createProduct(creatorId, product), listProducts(creatorId), purchaseProduct(userId, productId), getOrderHistory(userId), getCreatorSales(creatorId).

3. Create `packages/payments/src/services/compute-credits.service.ts` - ComputeCreditsService: Quant Compute Credits for pay-per-AI-action. Methods: purchaseCredits(userId, amount), deductCredits(userId, actionType, cost), getBalance(userId), getUsageHistory(userId). Credit costs vary by AI model (e.g., GPT-4 = 10 credits, GPT-3.5 = 2 credits).

4. Create `packages/payments/src/services/tax-document.service.ts` - TaxDocumentService: generates 1099/tax documents for creators. Methods: generateTaxDoc(creatorId, year) -> TaxDocument, getEarningsSummary(creatorId, year), isThresholdMet(creatorId) (>$600 triggers 1099).

6. Create E2E integration test `packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/creator-economy-e2e.test.ts`: tests the full flow - creator earns (via tips + pay-per-view + storefront sales), requests cashout/withdrawal, and receives a tax document. Uses existing TipService, CashoutService, and new TaxDocumentService together.
7. Update `packages/payments/src/index.ts` barrel export to include all new services and their schemas.
8. Update `packages/payments/src/types.ts` to add new types: PayPerViewPaywall, StorefrontProduct, ProductPurchase, ComputeCredit, CreditUsage, TaxDocument.
acceptance_criteria: All new payment services typecheck and have passing tests
Storefront supports product creation and purchase
Compute credits deduct correctly per AI action type
Tax document generates when earnings exceed $600
E2E test passes: creator earns, withdraws, and gets tax doc in single flow
findings: Floating point precision issue with revenue calculations (e.g., 169.15 * 3 = 507.45000000000005). Used toBeCloseTo in E2E test for accumulated revenue assertions. Pre-commit hook runs prettier and lint-staged successfully.
